[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Jul 15, 2007 6:15 pm I saw that on tokyo tosho, the description says: "brand new evangelion game. it plays like naruto narutimate hero. kinda."

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Jul 15, 2007 8:10 pm It's a 3D Eva fighter. My thoughts: -Heh, Tamashii no Rufuran. -lol generic winged sword Evangelion -Hey look, Unit 04 in general use -3D models look okayish
